prompt: Create a comic frame where the robot from the first image walks into the kitchen from the second image and says 'Dinner smells delicious, Chef!' in the style of the third image.
prompt_refined: Generate a single comic frame. The cute, white, spherical robot with glowing blue eyes from image 1 should be depicted walking into a retro-styled kitchen, similar in layout and elements to the kitchen from image 2 (featuring an oven on the left and cabinets). Position the robot as if entering from the left side of the frame, facing towards the right. Include a speech bubble above the robot's head containing the text 'Dinner smells delicious, Chef!'. The entire comic frame must be rendered in the distinctive pop-art comic book style seen in image 3, characterized by bold outlines, vibrant colors, and prominent Ben-Day dots.
objects: Cute, white, spherical robot (from image 1, with glowing blue eyes) entering from the left, facing right
Oven (on the left side of the kitchen)
Prominent Ben-Day dots (pop-art comic book style)
